name: Allied Sustainability and Environmental Consultants Group Limited
summary: Allied Sustainability and Environmental Consultants Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides environmental consulting services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through four segments: Green Building Certification Consultancy; Sustainability and Environmental Consultancy; Acoustic, Noise and Vibration Control and Audio-Visual Design Consultancy; and Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Reporting and Consultancy. It offers green building certification consultancy services for commercial, residential, and industrial buildings; hotels; data centers; and public usage buildings; and sustainability and environmental consultancy services, which engage in the process of environmental impact assessment to identify, predict, evaluate, and mitigate the biophysical, social, and other relevant effects of property development proposal. The company also provides acoustic analysis, design, and control in various kinds of spaces and buildings; ESG reporting and consultancy services, including ESG readiness assessment, developing reports for compliance and enhancement solutions, training to management and employees in various formats, assurance services, and translation services from English to Chinese; and other consultancy services. Allied Sustainability and Environmental Consultants Group Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Allied Sustainability and Environmental Consultants Group Limited is a subsidiary of Gold Investments Limited.
